llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Project Submission

Dear Professor Henderson,

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for my upcoming project, which is currently due in two days. I understand that the established deadline remains the primary expectation for all students in your course. However, I am facing unexpected challenges that are preventing me from completing the work to the standard you require.

First, I have encountered significant difficulties accessing the necessary research databases required for the literature review section. Second, I have been dealing with a sudden family medical emergency that has limited my ability to focus on this assignment. These combined issues have made it impossible for me to finalize the project by the current deadline.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause to your grading schedule. I am confident that with an additional two days, I can produce a high-quality submission that meets all academic standards. I have attached a brief outline of my current progress to demonstrate my commitment to the task.

Thank you very much for your time and for considering my situation. I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,

Alex Johnson
